templates.summary: Run AUDIT across the current drawing database to census associativity-related repair findings, with an explicit fix/no-fix answer slot.

fix_answer.description: AUDIT prompt answer for whether detected database errors should be fixed.

certification.diagnostic_stdout_pattern: 건의 오류를 찾아서 .*건이 수정됨|Total errors found .* fixed
certification.note: Diagnostic-class carve-out (cert wave 2): AUDIT on a healthy drawing correctly produces a ZERO entity diff (fix_answer=N found 0 errors on the wave-1 live run after auditing 68800 objects), so the logical-IR-diff effect bar cannot distinguish 'ran its pass, nothing to fix' from 'never ran'. The effect is instead proven by AUDIT's own completion summary line in stdout (Korean locale + English fallback).
